options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: planet_clear
options.description: Determines if clearing levels gives the player Planets (up to 48 planets)

options.name: planet_shuffle
options.description: The total amount of planets to be added to the item pool.

options.name: planet_requirement
options.description: The percentage of total planets needed to unlock the final level "That Hole..." and beat the game.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: cousins
options.description: Determines whether rolling up cousins will grant checks (up to 69 locations)

options.name: presents
options.description: Determines whether rolling up presents will grant checks (up to 39 locations)

options.name: crowns
options.description: Determines whether rolling up crowns will grant checks (up to 141 locations)

options.name: starting_level_count
options.description:
The number of levels that you will start with.
You will always start with "Tutorial" and "As Large As Possible 1".

options.name: exclude_levels
options.description: Prevents these levels from showing up in the seed.

options.name: rocket_weight
options.description: The weight of Rockets in the freebie pool.

options.name: magnet_weight
options.description: The weight of Magnets in the freebie pool.

options.name: sonar_weight
options.description: The weight of Sonars in the freebie pool.

options.name: timer_weight
options.description: The weight of Timers in the freebie pool.

options.name: mushroom_weight
options.description:
The weight of Mushrooms in the freebie pool.
This freebie increases your Katamari's size by 10%.

options.name: ice_axe_weight
options.description:
The weight of Ice Axes (Also known as "Pickels") in the freebie pool.
This freebie allows you to scale walls higher and faster.

options.name: super_freebie_chance
options.description:
The chance a freebie will be replaced by its super variant.
Super Mushroom increases your Katamari's size by 20%.
All other super freebies last twice as long as their regular variant.

options.name: junk_trap_chance
options.description: The chance an unfilled location will be filled with a junk or trap item.

options.name: stardust_weight
options.description: The weight of Stardust (junk item) in the junk/trap pool.

options.name: washpan_weight
options.description:
The weight of Washpan Traps in the junk/trap pool.
This trap decreases your Katamari's size by 10%.

options.name: spider_weight
options.description:
The weight of Spider Traps in the junk/trap pool.
This trap causes you to move slower.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
